Uses of Class
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException

  • Packages that use IllegalArgumentException 
    Package Description
    java.lang
    Provides classes that are fundamental to the Java programming language.
    javax.microedition.rms  

    • Uses of IllegalArgumentException in java.lang

      Subclasses of IllegalArgumentException in java.lang 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  IllegalThreadStateException
      Thrown to indicate that a thread is not in an appropriate state for the requested operation.
      class  NumberFormatException
      Thrown to indicate that the application has attempted to convert a string to one of the numeric types, but that the string does not have the appropriate format.

    • Uses of IllegalArgumentException in javax.microedition.rms

      Methods in javax.microedition.rms that throw IllegalArgumentException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void RecordStore.exportRecordStore(OutputStream os, String recordStoreName, String internalPassword, String exportPassword)
      Exports the record store to an RMS stream (see RMS Interchange Format).
      int RecordEnumeration.getRecordId(int index)
      Used to quickly find a record present at the specified index of the record enumeration.
